title: Noodle & Soul - The Heart of Springtown's Kitchen
content: Noodle & Soul is Springtown's beloved ramen shop, run by chef Rin for the past five years. Located between Hana's tea shop and the post office, the tiny restaurant was originally an abandoned storage room that Rin transformed with help from Taro (who made the furniture and bowls), Hana (tea during renovations), and Nori (who spread word before opening). Rin trained under a master chef in the city before finding her way to Springtown. Her signature dish is tonkotsu ramen with a broth that simmers for three days, featuring a secret hint of dried citrus peel. She also serves shio ramen for travelers needing restoration. Her regular customers include Emi (who writes at the counter when stuck), Nori (who comes every Tuesday), Taro (who has a reserved seat), and Kai (who plays guitar outside on weekends). Rin's philosophy is that food should tell a story and heal the heart.
